mapper.insert:
insert into tb_user_role (user_role_id, user_id, role_id, is_valid) values
#{item.userRoleId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.isValid}
mapper.select: SELECT r.role_id, r.role_name FROM `tb_user_role` t LEFT JOIN `tb_role` r ON r.role_id = t.role_id where t.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT t.role_id, t.role_name, t.is_valid FROM tb_role t
AND t.is_valid = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tb_user_role ur WHERE ur.role_id = t.role_id AND ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.is_valid = 1)
AND t.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{params.roleNameLike},'%')

SELECT t.role_id, t.role_name, t.is_valid FROM tb_role t
AND t.is_valid = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tb_user_role ur WHERE ur.role_id = t.role_id AND ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.is_valid = 1)
AND t.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{params.roleNameLike},'%')
